ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the athlete. */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete. */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country represented by the athlete. */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete. */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete. */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sport. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event. */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event. */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline within the sport. */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sport. */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sport. */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the medal. */,
  "medal_name" TEXT /* Name of the medal. */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the medal was awarded. */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the Olympic event was held. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participations" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the athlete's participation. */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Athletes table. */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Events table. */,
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Medals table. */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the athlete's participation. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "olympic_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the Olympic Game. */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the Olympic Game took place. */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the Olympic Game was held. */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the Olympic Game (Summer/Winter). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the athlete.
City where the Olympic event was held.
Unique identifier for the athlete's participation.
Foreign key referencing the Athletes table.
Foreign key referencing the Events table.
Foreign key referencing the Medals table.
Unique identifier for the Olympic Game.
Year the Olympic Game took place.
City where the Olympic Game was held.
